name: Puzzlezon
short_description: Grid-based logic game where your goal is to get to the end of each level. Manage all the obstacles on your way to make a path. Push cardboxes, rotate racks and fill holes with boxes.
detailed_description:
Play as a warehouseman working in one of the biggest warehouse networks in the world.
You are tired after all day work, gladly your exceptional boss put a meditation booths where you can relax!
Unfortunately all the floors are filled with all kinds of stuff so getting there won't be an easy task.
Cardboxes that can be pushed by player.
Racks with pallets that can be rotated.
Holes in floor that can be filled with throwing boxes into them.

Key features:

* Grid-based movement
* Third person camera
* 50 levels
